docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO JAN-28-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-18-2025 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF LILY DE CHAMPRIS IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT BRICK AND TIMBER, REPRESENTED BY PRISCILLA YOKLAVICH, SR.
